title: Suspicious Usage of base64
description: Detects execution of potentially suspicious binary base64.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'base64'))
